text:

Hello, thank you for using FreeBSD! You might consider to 
contact the x11@freebsd.org mailinglist so that they might 
point you whether this is OK or not or possibly the ports@freebsd.org 
mailinglist instead. Since this is not a problem report I 
will close this PR. 

Thanks
